tool_args.label: M60 Select Bus Service on 125th Street - CB11 Transportation Committee

payload.title: M60 Select Bus Service on 125th Street
payload.description: Presentation to Community Board 11 Transportation Committee on January 6, 2015, covering M60 SBS 2014 implementation, preliminary results, and Lexington Avenue bus bulb proposal.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Community Board 11 Transportation Committee
MTA
M60 Select Bus Service

payload.route_name: M60 Select Bus Service on 125th Street

tool_args.label: Bx15
125th Street
Lexington Avenue at 125th Street
M60 SBS 2014 Implementation on 125th Street

payload.description: Implementation of M60 Select Bus Service on 125th Street including station amenities, stop changes, dedicated bus lanes, parking changes, and commercial loading zones.

tool_args.label: Lexington Avenue Curb Extensions (Bus Bulbs)

payload.project_name: Lexington Avenue Curb Extension Proposal at 125th Street
payload.description: Curb extension (bus bulb) proposals for 125th Street and Lexington Avenue intersection, presented to CB11 in 2013. Opportunity to shape proposal while still in design phase.

tool_args.label: 126th Street Curb Regulation Changes

payload.description: Proposed curb regulation changes on 126th Street, affecting areas west and east of Lenox Avenue, including ASP additions, metered parking, truck loading zones, and turn bays.

tool_args.label: M60 SBS Service Launch

payload.description: M60 Select Bus Service launched on May 25, 2014. Customer Ambassadors staffed SBS stops for two weeks during launch period to explain fare payment and stop changes.

tool_args.label: CB11 Transportation Committee Meeting

payload.description: Community Board 11 Transportation Committee meeting where M60 SBS results and Lexington Avenue curb extension proposal were presented.

tool_args.label: 126th Street Curb Regulation Changes

payload.description: Proposed curb regulation changes on 126th Street, affecting areas west and east of Lenox Avenue, including ASP additions, metered parking, truck loading zones, and turn bays.

tool_args.label: Dedicated Bus Lanes on 125th Street between Lenox Av and Second Av

payload.location_text: 125th Street between Lenox Av and Second Av
payload.description: Dedicated lanes for buses and right turns installed between Lenox Av and Second Av, including offset bus lane eastbound and westbound, curbside bus lane eastbound only.

normalized_location.raw_text: 125th Street between Lenox Av and Second Av

tool_args.label: 39 Fare Machines and 6 Bus Shelters on 125th Street

payload.description: 39 fare machines and 6 new bus shelters installed along 125th Street as part of M60 SBS implementation.

tool_args.label: Bus Time Wayfinding Panel at Madison Avenue

payload.description: Bus Time wayfinding panel at Madison Av was one of the first installed in NYC. Additional panels to be installed at other 125th St stops in 2015.

tool_args.label: Parking and Commercial Loading Changes on 125th Street

payload.location_text: 125th Street between Fifth and Third Avenues; 124th and 126th Streets
payload.description: Metered parking added on 125th Street between Fifth and Third Avenues. 200 new parking spaces for residential/retail use on 124th and 126th Streets. 9 new AM commercial loading zones installed on 125th Street.

normalized_location.raw_text: 125th Street between Fifth and Third Avenues; 124th and 126th Streets

tool_args.label: Proposed Curb Extensions (Bus Bulbs) at Lexington Avenue and 125th Street

payload.description: Curb extension proposals for 125th Street and Lexington Avenue intersection, presented to CB11 in 2013. Options shown for northwest and southeast corners with right turn lanes.
